title: oberonia suborbicularis
intro: Oberonia suborbicularis is a type of orchid plant, specifically a species of the genus Oberonia, which is known for its unique and delicate flowers. This plant has been traditionally used in medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Oberonia suborbicularis are said to include reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating various respiratory issues such as cough and asthma. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to harness its medicinal properties.
